scope.reason: 665641 physical Rust lines in crates/ non-test/non-benchmark scan; reference guide marks >50000 lines as an extra-large project
excluded: parser, AST, semantic model, cache, notebook, WASM, LSP server
CI, release, fuzzing, benchmarks, and Python helper scripts

tools.git: used for rev-parse/status/show only; no history traversal

requirements_not_performed: interactive mode-selection/report-detail questions: user preselected standard mode and this is a physical baseline
external web research and official-site crawl: not performed
Git history analysis: prohibited by user
test, compilation, and Clippy: cargo/rustc unavailable; documented snapshot-updating test command would also violate source read-only constraint
